hero.title: How Morocco Discovery protects your information.
hero.description: This policy explains what we collect, why we use it, and the choices you have when using Morocco Discovery.

account.label: Account data
account.value: Name, email, authentication provider, and profile details

travel.label: Travel activity
travel.value: Searches, saved preferences, reviews, and booking inquiries

protection.label: Protection
protection.value: Access controls, secure sessions, and trusted infrastructure

summary.title: Privacy at a glance
summary.description: Morocco Discovery uses personal information to operate accounts, personalize travel discovery, maintain secure sessions, and respond to user requests.

collect.title: Information We Collect
items: Account information such as your name, email address, profile details, and authentication provider.
Travel preferences, destination searches, restaurant interests, saved items, reviews, and inquiry details you choose to submit.
Technical information such as browser type, device information, IP address, cookies, and basic usage events.
OAuth profile data shared by providers such as Google or Facebook when you choose to sign in through them.

use.title: How We Use Information
items: Create and manage your Morocco Discovery account.
Personalize destination, restaurant, and travel recommendations.
Respond to support messages, booking inquiries, and account requests.
Improve site performance, prevent abuse, and keep the service secure.

providers.title: Authentication And Service Providers
items: We use Supabase to provide authentication, manage sessions, and store account-related data.
When you sign in with Google or Facebook, those providers process your login according to their own privacy terms.
We may use infrastructure, analytics, email, image hosting, and support providers only as needed to operate the service.
We do not sell your personal information.

cookies.title: Cookies And Sessions
items: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and protect authenticated routes.
We may use preference cookies to remember language, interface, and travel browsing choices.
You can control cookies through your browser, but disabling essential cookies may prevent account features from working.

choices.title: Your Choices
items: You can update account details from your profile where available.
You can sign out at any time from your profile page.
You can request access, correction, deletion, or export of your personal information by contacting us.
You can stop OAuth access by changing permissions in your Google or Facebook account settings.

retention.title: Data Retention And Security
items: We retain personal information only for as long as needed to provide the service, comply with obligations, resolve disputes, or protect the platform.
We use technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect personal information.
No online service can guarantee perfect security, so you should use a strong password and protect access to your email and OAuth accounts.

contact.title: Questions about this policy
contact.description: For privacy requests or questions, contact Morocco Discovery at contact@moroccodiscovery.com or write to 123 Avenue Mohammed V, Gueliz, Marrakech 40000.
